summary: Web project with admin panel supporting login-based access for making changes and uploading images.
architectural_notes: Admin panel authentication: username + password login grants access to make changes and upload images
known_issues: Unauthorised admin login error occurring at back-end preventing admin panel access

existing_features.title: Update the frontend admin authentication flow so that after a successful username/password login, all subsequent backend calls to admin-restricted endpoints (upload artwork, edit content, upload images, save social/media contacts) are authorized correctly. Ensure the session token or credential established at login is passed along with every admin backend call.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix unauthorised admin login error at back-end; username and password should be sufficient to access admin panel for making changes and uploading images

Fix the backend admin authentication so that username and password credentials are sufficient to grant admin access. The backend `loginAdmin` (or equivalent) function must accept a username+password pair and return a valid admin session/role without requiring Internet Identity or any additional principal-based check. Admin role must persist for the duration of the session.
